mapper.sql: id, goal_id, user_id, module_key, module_name, task_date, title, description, planned_minutes, task_score, priority, status, source, route_path, complete_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO growth_autopilot_task ( goal_id, user_id, module_key, module_name, task_date, title, description, planned_minutes, task_score, priority, status, source, route_path, complete_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.goalId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.moduleKey}, #{item.moduleName}, #{item.taskDate}, #{item.title}, #{item.description}, #{item.plannedMinutes}, #{item.taskScore}, #{item.priority}, #{item.status}, #{item.source}, #{item.routePath}, #{item.completeTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM growth_autopilot_task WHERE goal_id = #{goalId} ORDER BY task_date ASC, priority ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM growth_autopilot_task WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
